nasb.text: Then David said to Ahimelech the Hittite and to Abishai the son of Zeruiah, Joab’s brother, saying, “Who will go down with me to Saul in the camp?” And Abishai said, “I will go down with you.”

esv.text: Then David said to Ahimelech the Hittite, and to Joab’s brother Abishai the son of Zeruiah, “Who will go down with me into the camp to Saul?” And Abishai said, “I will go down with you.”

cnv.text: 大衛問赫人亞希米勒和洗魯雅的兒子約押的兄弟亞比篩，說：“誰願與我一起下到掃羅的營裡去呢？”亞比篩回答：“我願與你一起下去。”

ccb.text: 大卫问赫人亚希米勒和洗鲁雅的儿子约押的兄弟亚比筛：“谁愿意跟我到扫罗的营里？”亚比筛答道：“我愿意。”
